creator: leeb@ratnaling.org
text:
Created attachment 189667
Changes to get 9.2.1 to compile

The ownership problems still exist, but this patch moves the port to 9.2.1.

* poudriere testport is good
* poudriere build is good
* upgraded from 9.1.? worked well, following the official procedure at http://glpi-project.org/spip.php?article172
